attributes.Sql Query:
select 
 WIJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,WIJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   
,WIJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,WIJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
, case when (WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 3790  and WIJEL.SS_CD ='EMEA')
       then TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
	  else BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD  end  FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE       
,EFFECTIVE_DT                  
,EFFECTIVE_DT_CALENDAR_CD      
,EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT
,EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT    
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,INTERCOMPANY_ROLE             
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE       
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE_CD    
,OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT      
,CAST(case when (  WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 
                     or  (WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 3790  and WIJEL.SS_CD ='EMEA') ) /* Added this New Ledger as part of CCER Oct 2012 Release ) */
     then WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR
     ELSE ( WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR * WIJELWR.USD_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE     )
 END  AS DECIMAL(26,7)) RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT          
,CAST(case when (  WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 
                     or  (WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 3790  and WIJEL.SS_CD ='EMEA') ) /* Added this New Ledger as part of CCER Oct 2012 Release ) */
     then WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR
     ELSE ( WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR * WIJELWR.USD_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE ) 
 END   AS DECIMAL(26,7)) RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT   
/* Commented as a part of Over-ride Conversion Rate CR
Logic

If Set of Books = 5 and Functional Currency = USD, then Trx = Entered, Func = Accounted, USD=Accounted
If Set of Books = 5 and Functional Currency <> USD, then  Trx = Entered, Func = Entered, USD = Accounted
If Set of Books <> 5
then Trx = Entered, Func = Accounted
If Currency = USD,
then USD = Accounted
Else USD = Entered * Conversion Rate (Daily)
End If
End If

,CAST(CASE WHEN WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 
      then WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR * WIJELWR.FUNC_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE    
      ELSE WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR 
 END    AS DECIMAL(26,7))   RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT      
,CAST(CASE WHEN WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 
      then WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR * WIJELWR.FUNC_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE    
      ELSE WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR 
 END  AS DECIMAL(26,7)) RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT */ 
/* Sep 2012  */ 
/* Commented this as part of CCER new Ledger  3790 logic
,CAST(CASE WHEN (WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 AND BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD <> 'USD')
      then WIJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT    
      ELSE WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR 
 END    AS DECIMAL(26,7))   RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT  
,CAST(CASE WHEN (WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 AND BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD <> 'USD')
      then WIJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    
      ELSE WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR 
 END  AS DECIMAL(26,7)) RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT 
 */
 /* New Functional Amount logic as below from CCER OCT FY13 release
 If  (SOB= 5 & FUN_CUR <> 'USD' ) or ( SOB_ID = 3790 )
	then Entered
else Accounted 
end
*/
,CAST(CASE  WHEN  ( (WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 AND BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD <> 'USD')
                         or  (WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 3790  and WIJEL.SS_CD ='EMEA') )  
      then WIJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT    
      ELSE WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR 
 END    AS DECIMAL(26,7))   RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT  
,CAST(CASE WHEN ((WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 AND BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD <> 'USD')
                                                                or  (WIJEL.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 3790  and WIJEL.SS_CD ='EMEA') )  
      then WIJEL.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    
      ELSE WIJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR 
 END  AS DECIMAL(26,7)) RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_COMPANY_CD 
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_DEPT_CD    
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_ACCT_CD
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_LOC_CD 
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_PROJECT_CD 
,RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_SUBACCT_CD 
,RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT   
,RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    
,SS_CD                         
,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT 
,DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT   
,DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT    
,DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
,DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
,DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD           
,DD_BK_DEPT_CD                 
,DD_BK_PROJECT_CD              
,DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
,JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR  
,EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID
,JEL_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY
,JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DTM
,DV_JRNL_ENTRY_LINE_CREATE_DT
         FROM
$$stgdb.WI_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE  WIJEL
inner join
$$stgdb.WI_JRNL_ENTRY_LNE_WTH_RATE WIJELWR
on  WIJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT =WIJELWR.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
and WIJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   =WIJELWR.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   
and WIJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              =WIJELWR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
and WIJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE               =WIJELWR.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND ( (WIJEL.ACCOUNT_TYPE =  'OTHER'  AND (WIJELWR.FUNC_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE IS  NOT NULL AND  WIJELWR.USD_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE IS NOT NULL))
       OR WIJEL.ACCOUNT_TYPE =  'BALANCE SHEET' 
)

SELECT
NCCDRM.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
,NCCDRM.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE 
,(NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
,MAX(NCCDRM.PL_CONVERSION_RATE) PL_CONVERSION_RATE
,MAX(NCCDRM.BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE) BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE
FROM
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDRM ,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM,
	(
	SELECT
	PLRT.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
	,PLRT.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE
	,PLRT.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
	,PLRT.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
	,PLRT.BK_CONVERSION_DATE_MAX
	,BSRT.BK_CONVERSION_DATE_MAX AS BK_CONVERSION_DATE_MAX_BSRT
	FROM
		(SELECT 
			BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
			,BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE
			,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
			,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
			,MAX(BK_CONVERSION_DATE)BK_CONVERSION_DATE_MAX
		FROM
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR,
			$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFIS
		WHERE NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE BETWEEN NFIS.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFIS.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
			AND (NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD' OR NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD')
			AND (PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NOT NULL OR BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE IS NOT NULL)  
			AND PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NOT NULL
		GROUP BY BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE,BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
		) PLRT
		LEFT OUTER JOIN
		(
		SELECT 
			 BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
			,BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE
			,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
			,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
			,MAX(BK_CONVERSION_DATE) BK_CONVERSION_DATE_MAX
		FROM
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR,
			$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFIS
			WHERE NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE BETWEEN NFIS.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFIS.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
				AND (NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD' OR NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD')
				AND (PL_CONVERSION_RATE IS NOT NULL OR BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE IS NOT NULL)  
				AND BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE IS NOT NULL
		GROUP BY BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE,BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
		) BSRT
		ON PLRT.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE 		= BSRT.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
		AND PLRT.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE 		= BSRT.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE
		AND PLRT.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 	= BSRT.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
		AND PLRT.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT 	= BSRT.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
	)PL_CONV
WHERE	    NCCDRM.BK_CONVERSION_DATE BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE  AND NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
	AND NCCDRM.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = PL_CONV.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
	AND NCCDRM.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = PL_CONV.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE
	AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = PL_CONV.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
	AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = PL_CONV.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
GROUP BY 
	NCCDRM.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
	,NCCDRM.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE 
	,(NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)

SELECT 
 BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   
,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,BK_COMPANY_CODE  
,CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'BALANCE SHEET' 
     THEN WICR_USD.BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE
     ELSE WICR_USD.PL_CONVERSION_RATE
 END AS  USD_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE
,CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'BALANCE SHEET' 
     THEN WICR_FUNC.BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE
     ELSE WICR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE
 END AS  FUNC_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE
FROM 
 ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE 
   where  PERIOD_NAME not like '%ADJ%'
  ) WIJEL
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  $$STGDB.WI_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE
 WICR_USD
  on  WICR_USD.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE =  WIJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
  and WICR_USD.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  = 'USD'
  and WICR_USD.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  = WIJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  $$STGDB.WI_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE WICR_FUNC
  ON  WICR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE= 'USD'
  AND WICR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE   =  WIJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
  AND WICR_FUNC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  = WIJEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT    
UNION ALL
SELECT 
BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   
,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,BK_COMPANY_CODE  
,CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'BALANCE SHEET' 
     THEN NCCDR_USD.BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE
     ELSE NCCDR_USD.PL_CONVERSION_RATE
 END as  USD_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE
,CASE WHEN ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'BALANCE SHEET' 
     THEN NCCDR_FUNC.BALANCE_SHEET_CONV_RATE
     ELSE NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE
 END as  FUNC_CONVERSION_DAILY_RATE
FROM 
 ( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE 
   where  PERIOD_NAME like '%ADJ%'
  ) WIJEL
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_USD
  on  NCCDR_USD.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE =  WIJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
  and NCCDR_USD.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE  = 'USD'
  and NCCDR_USD.BK_CONVERSION_DATE  = WIJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT  
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
  on  NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE= 'USD'
  and NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE   =  WIJEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
  and NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE  = WIJEL.EFFECTIVE_DT

SELECT 
 COMPANY
,CURRENCY_CODE
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
,GLOBAL_NAME
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP EECSM
INNER JOIN  ( SELECT
		BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
                BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
	        BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100 + 
                BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  as FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
	     FROM   
		$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH 
            )NFM
      ON NFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  BETWEEN 
           CAST(EECSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID AS INTEGER)	
       AND CAST(EECSM.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID  AS INTEGER)
GROUP BY
 COMPANY
,CURRENCY_CODE
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
,GLOBAL_NAME
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT

SELECT	
 SMOEJEL.JE_LINE_NUM AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
,SMOEJEL.JE_HEADER_ID AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
,NSOBTV.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY      
,NSOBTV.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT 
, NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AS BK_COMPANY_CD
, SMOEJEL.LINE_TYPE_CODE  AS JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE
,CASE WHEN	SMOEJEL.REFERENCE_6 = 'AP INVOICES'   THEN 'INVOICE JOURNAL ENTRY LINE' 
		WHEN	SMOEJEL.REFERENCE_6 = 'AP PAYMENTS'  THEN 'INVOICE PAYMENT JOURNAL ENTRY LINE' 
		ELSE	'NO REFERENCE'
 END	AS JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE_CD	    
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD
,SMOEJEL.GLOBAL_NAME
,CAST(SMOEJEL.EFFECTIVE_DATE  AS DATE) AS EFFECTIVE_DT
,SMOEJEL.PERIOD_NAME
,(NJE.EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT*100 +NJE.EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT ) AS    DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
,CASE  WHEN	((SMOEJEL.ENTERED_DR IS NOT NULL AND SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR IS NOT NULL)
        OR	(SMOEJEL.ENTERED_DR <> '0' 	AND	 SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR <> '0'))
   	  AND	((SMOEJEL.ENTERED_CR IS NULL 	AND	SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR IS NULL)
        OR	(SMOEJEL.ENTERED_CR =0 	AND	SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR=0)) 
       THEN 'DEBIT'
      WHEN	((SMOEJEL.ENTERED_CR  IS NOT NULL 	AND	SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR  IS NOT NULL)
      	OR (SMOEJEL.ENTERED_CR <> '0' AND	SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR <> '0'))
           AND ((SMOEJEL.ENTERED_DR IS NULL AND	SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR IS  NULL)
           OR  (SMOEJEL.ENTERED_DR ='0'	AND    SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR='0')) 
      THEN 'CREDIT'
    WHEN	(SMOEJEL.ENTERED_DR <> '0'   	AND	SMOEJEL.ENTERED_CR<> '0') 
      THEN 'CR/DR'
	 ELSE	'NA'
END	AS DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE
,CASE			WHEN	IC_ROLE.IC_ACCOUNT IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y'	  ELSE	'N'		END	AS INTERCOMPANY_ROLE	 
,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
,NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT 
,NGLA.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT AS DD_BK_FINACIAL_ACCT_LCLTY_INT 
,NGLA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT AS  DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT    
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE AS   DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE  AS DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
,NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD           
,NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS DD_BK_DEPT_CD                 
,NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE AS DD_BK_PROJECT_CD
,SMOEJEL.ENTERED_DR AS RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT
,SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR  AS ACCOUNTED_CR  
,SMOEJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR  AS  ACCOUNTED_DR
,COALESCE(WECSM.CURRENCY_CODE,NSOBTV.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE) as BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,SMOEJEL.ENTERED_CR 	AS RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT    
,CASE WHEN	INTERCOMPANY_ROLE ='Y'              THEN SMOEJEL.ATTRIBUTE2  
		ELSE	NULL	END	AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_LOC_CD      
,CASE WHEN	INTERCOMPANY_ROLE ='Y'              THEN SMOEJEL.ATTRIBUTE5 
		ELSE	NULL	END	AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_SUBACCT_CD
,CASE WHEN	INTERCOMPANY_ROLE ='Y'              THEN SMOEJEL.ATTRIBUTE3
		ELSE	NULL	END	AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_DEPT_CD         
,CASE WHEN	INTERCOMPANY_ROLE ='Y'              THEN SMOEJEL.ATTRIBUTE6   
		ELSE	NULL	END	AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_PROJECT_CD          
,CASE WHEN	INTERCOMPANY_ROLE ='Y'              THEN SMOEJEL.ATTRIBUTE1   
		ELSE	NULL	END	AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_COMPANY_CD           
,CASE WHEN	INTERCOMPANY_ROLE ='Y'              THEN SMOEJEL.ATTRIBUTE4  			
    	ELSE	NULL	END	AS RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_ACCT_CD
,NJE.EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT 
,NJE.EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT	
,NJE.EFFECTIVE_DT_CALENDAR_CD	
,NJE.OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT      AS OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT
,CASE WHEN BAL_SHEET.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE IS NULL THEN 'OTHER' ELSE 'BALANCE SHEET' END AS ACCOUNT_TYPE  
,CASE WHEN WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID is not null  
       and WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = 5 Then 'MC' 
      WHEN WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID is not null 
       and WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID <> 5 Then 'MO'  
      WHEN NSOBTV.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT =5 THEN 'UC' ELSE 'UO' 
 END DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME 
,SMOEJEL.DESCRIPTION as  JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR  
,NJE.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,SMOEJEL.ATTRIBUTE15 as EP_PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID
,COALESCE(EPAPF.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY, -999) AS JEL_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY
,COALESCE(SMOEJEL.CREATION_DATE,TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
,COALESCE(SMOEJEL.CREATION_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01')
FROM
(
SELECT	
      SMFJEL.JE_LINE_NUM
     ,SMFJEL.JE_HEADER_ID 
     ,SMFJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID 
     ,SMFJEL.LINE_TYPE_CODE                                   
     ,SMFJEL.REFERENCE_6 
     ,SMFJEL.GLOBAL_NAME
     ,SMFJEL.EFFECTIVE_DATE 
     , SMFJEL.ENTERED_DR
     ,SMFJEL.ENTERED_CR
     ,SMFJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR 
     ,SMFJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR    
     ,SMFJEL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
     ,SMFJEL.ATTRIBUTE2
     ,SMFJEL.ATTRIBUTE4
     ,SMFJEL.ATTRIBUTE5
     ,SMFJEL.ATTRIBUTE3
     ,SMFJEL.ATTRIBUTE6
     ,SMFJEL.ATTRIBUTE1
     ,SMFJEL.PERIOD_NAME
     ,SMFJEL.DESCRIPTION
,SMFJEL.ATTRIBUTE15
,SMFJEL.CREATED_BY
,SMFJEL.CREATION_DATE
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_JE_LINES SMFJEL
WHERE	STATUS='P'
UNION	ALL
SELECT	
      EMOJEL.JE_LINE_NUM
     ,EMOJEL.JE_HEADER_ID 
     ,EMOJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID  
     ,EMOJEL.LINE_TYPE_CODE                                  
     ,EMOJEL.REFERENCE_6 
     ,EMOJEL.GLOBAL_NAME
     ,EMOJEL.EFFECTIVE_DATE 
     ,EMOJEL.ENTERED_DR
     ,EMOJEL.ENTERED_CR
     ,EMOJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR 
     ,EMOJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR   
     ,EMOJEL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
     ,EMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE2
     ,EMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE4
     ,EMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE5
     ,EMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE3
     ,EMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE6
     ,EMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE1
     ,EMOJEL.PERIOD_NAME
     ,EMOJEL.DESCRIPTION
,EMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE15 
,EMOJEL.CREATED_BY
,EMOJEL.CREATION_DATE
FROM	$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_OM_GL_JE_LINES EMOJEL
WHERE	STATUS='P'
) SMOEJEL 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON	SMOEJEL.GLOBAL_NAME= NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOBTV
	ON	 	SMOEJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID =NSOBTV.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT        
	AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSOBTV.SS_CODE  

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  NGLA
	ON		SMOEJEL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    
	AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =  NGLA.SS_CODE                                                  
	AND	  NSOBTV.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY  NJE 
	ON	SMOEJEL.JE_HEADER_ID=  NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
	AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =   NJE.SS_CD 
	AND   NSOBTV.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
		SELECT	EGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,EGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,ECGIM.IC_ACCOUNT,ECGIM.COUNTRY_CODE
		FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS EGCC,$$ETLVWDB.EL_CFI_GL_IC_MAPPING ECGIM
		WHERE	EGCC.SEGMENT4=ECGIM.IC_ACCOUNT
			AND	EGCC.SEGMENT1=ECGIM.COUNTRY_CODE
		GROUP BY EGCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,EGCC.GLOBAL_NAME,ECGIM.IC_ACCOUNT,ECGIM.COUNTRY_CODE
)IC_ROLE
	ON	IC_ROLE.CODE_COMBINATION_ID=SMOEJEL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
	AND	SMOEJEL.GLOBAL_NAME=IC_ROLE.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT A.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT A, $$STGDB.WI_BAL_SHEET_ACCT_GROUP B
WHERE 
A.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID=B.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID) BAL_SHEET
ON NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE=BAL_SHEET.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP WECSM
ON	    WECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = NSOBTV.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
	AND	WECSM.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND	WECSM.COMPANY = NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
	AND	WECSM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = NJE.EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT
	AND   WECSM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  = NJE.EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT
		
LEFT JOIN(
SELECT 
PERSON_ID,
GLOBAL_NAME,
CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
BK_EMPLOYEE_ID,EMPLOYEE_NUMBER
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EPAP
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
ON EPAP.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER = NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID ) EPAPF 
ON ( SMOEJEL.CREATED_BY = EPAPF.PERSON_ID
AND SMOEJEL.GLOBAL_NAME = EPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT
 SMOJEL.BATCH_ID                      
,SMOJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR                  
,SMOJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR                  
,SMOJEL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG      
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE1                    
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE2                    
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE3                    
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE4                    
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE5                    
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE6                    
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE7                    
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE8                    
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE9                    
,SMOJEL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,SMOJEL.CREATED_BY                    
,SMOJEL.CREATION_DATE                 
,SMOJEL.DESCRIPTION                   
,SMOJEL.EFFECTIVE_DATE                
,SMOJEL.ENTERED_CR                    
,SMOJEL.ENTERED_DR                    
,SMOJEL.GL_SL_LINK_ID                 
,SMOJEL.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE              
,SMOJEL.INVOICE_AMOUNT                
,SMOJEL.INVOICE_DATE                  
,SMOJEL.INVOICE_IDENTIFIER            
,SMOJEL.JE_HEADER_ID                  
,SMOJEL.JE_LINE_NUM                   
,SMOJEL.LINE_TYPE_CODE                
,SMOJEL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SMOJEL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SMOJEL.NO1                           
,SMOJEL.PERIOD_NAME                   
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_1                   
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_10                  
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_2                   
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_3                   
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_4                   
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_5                   
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_6                   
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_7                   
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_8                   
,SMOJEL.REFERENCE_9                   
,SMOJEL.STATUS                        
,SMOJEL.JEBE_VAT_ALLOC_FLAG           
,SMOJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,SMOJEL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SMOJEL.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SMOJEL.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SMOJEL.ACTION_CODE  
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
,SMOJEL.ATTRIBUTE15
FROM
(
	select 
		 SMGJEL.BATCH_ID                      
		,SMGJEL.ACCOUNTED_CR                  
		,SMGJEL.ACCOUNTED_DR                  
		,SMGJEL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG      
		,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE1                    
		,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE2                    
		,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE3                    
		,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE4                    
		,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE5                    
		,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE6                    
		,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE7                    
		,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE8                    
		,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE9                    
		,SMGJEL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,SMGJEL.CREATED_BY                    
		,SMGJEL.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SMGJEL.DESCRIPTION                   
		,SMGJEL.EFFECTIVE_DATE                
		,SMGJEL.ENTERED_CR                    
		,SMGJEL.ENTERED_DR                    
		,SMGJEL.GL_SL_LINK_ID                 
		,SMGJEL.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE              
		,SMGJEL.INVOICE_AMOUNT                
		,SMGJEL.INVOICE_DATE                  
		,SMGJEL.INVOICE_IDENTIFIER            
		,SMGJEL.JE_HEADER_ID                  
		,SMGJEL.JE_LINE_NUM                   
		,SMGJEL.LINE_TYPE_CODE                
		,SMGJEL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SMGJEL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SMGJEL.NO1                           
		,SMGJEL.PERIOD_NAME                   
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_1                   
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_10                  
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_2                   
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_3                   
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_4                   
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_5                   
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_6                   
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_7                   
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_8                   
		,SMGJEL.REFERENCE_9                   
		,SMGJEL.STATUS                        
		,SMGJEL.JEBE_VAT_ALLOC_FLAG           
		,SMGJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
		,SMGJEL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,SMGJEL.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMGJEL.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SMGJEL.ACTION_CODE     
,SMGJEL.ATTRIBUTE15              
	from  $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_JE_LINES SMGJEL
       WHERE STATUS='P'

) SMOJEL 
WHERE 	  
 NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM   $$WORKDB.W_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE  WJEL,
                              $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
                              $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  NSOBTV
              WHERE  WJEL.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                and  wjel.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOBTV.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                AND  WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT =  SMOJEL.JE_LINE_NUM   
                and  WJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   =  SMOJEL.JE_HEADER_ID
                and  NSOBTV.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT  =      SMOJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
                and  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME               =      SMOJEL.GLOBAL_NAME
            )

/* Added new code here */
OR
            NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS  EGCC, $$ETLVWDB.EL_ED_COMPANY_SOURCE_MAP  EECSM,
			$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   RFMY                  
              WHERE  EGCC.code_combination_id = SMOJEL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
                                                  and EGCC.segment1 = EECSM.company
                                                   and SMOJEL.GLOBAL_NAME= EECSM.GLOBAL_NAME
                                                   and SMOJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = EECSM.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID        
                                                and RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG     = 'Y'
                                               and      EECSM.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID >= RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
